caption:
"It's going to be a wild weekend for @uicpepband! Half of our crew is St. Louis-bound to back @uic_mbb in the Arch Madness tournament, while the other half is holding it down at home to support @uic_wbb 🏀. 

Follow our story for behind-the-scenes peeks from our students! Go Flames 🔥".

133 likes, 0 comments - uictheatremusic March 6, 2025: "It's going to be a wild weekend for @uicpepband! Half of our crew is St. Louis-bound to back @uic_mbb in the Arch Madness tournament, while the other half is holding it down at home to support @uic_wbb 🏀. 

Follow our story for behind-the-scenes peeks from our students! Go Flames 🔥".

caption: "We are so excited to announce that some talented members from our band will be performing in the @cbdna_national @intercollegiatemb!  Nearly 1,500 nominated students from 200 college bands in 45 states and Puerto Rico will keep the spirit alive by working together in a virtual marching band show. The video will premiere online on the Intercollegiate Marching Band YouTube channel and at the stadium during halftime of the @CollegeFootballNational Championship game on Jan. 11, 2021! Want to learn more? Check out the official press release at https://tinyurl.com/cbdna-imb-pr and follow @intercollegiatemb today! Finally, make a donation to support this endeavor at fansraise.com/imb.".
caption_raw: 15 likes, 0 comments - uicpepband January 11, 2021: "We are so excited to announce that some talented members from our band will be performing in the @cbdna_national @intercollegiatemb!  Nearly 1,500 nominated students from 200 college bands in 45 states and Puerto Rico will keep the spirit alive by working together in a virtual marching band show. The video will premiere online on the Intercollegiate Marching Band YouTube channel and at the stadium during halftime of the @CollegeFootballNational Championship game on Jan. 11, 2021! Want to learn more? Check out the official press release at https://tinyurl.com/cbdna-imb-pr and follow @intercollegiatemb today! Finally, make a donation to support this endeavor at fansraise.com/imb.".

caption:
"Today we celebrated an amazing class of graduating seniors. This group has made so many contributions to the band, and we want to thank them for everything they have done over the years. Thank them for the early mornings, long days, and late nights. Thank them for sparking new traditions, arranging their own music, fixing broken instruments, inspiring their peers, and the countless hours making the band better. Thank you Alex, Kevyn, Omero, Nathan, Brian, Claudine, Matthew, and Kayla! 🔥 (PC: @samthesaxplaya) .
.
.
.

#pepbandneverloses #foreverflames #flamesforever".
